mapper.insert: INSERT INTO private_message(sender_id, receiver_id, product_id, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{productId}, #{content}, false, now())
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.product_id, m.content, m.is_read, m.create_time, sender.username AS sender_name, receiver.username AS receiver_name, p.title AS product_title FROM private_message m LEFT JOIN sys_user sender ON m.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN sys_user receiver ON m.receiver_id = receiver.id LEFT JOIN product p ON m.product_id = p.id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{targetId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{targetId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m.create_time ASC, m.id ASC

WITH msg AS ( SELECT m.*, CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END AS target_id FROM private_message m WHERE m.sender_id = #{userId} OR m.receiver_id = #{userId} ), latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (target_id) * FROM msg ORDER BY target_id, create_time DESC, id DESC ) SELECT l.id, l.sender_id, l.receiver_id, l.product_id, l.content, l.is_read, l.create_time, l.target_id, target.username AS target_name, sender.username AS sender_name, receiver.username AS receiver_name, p.title AS product_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM private_message unread WHERE unread.sender_id = l.target_id AND unread.receiver_id = #{userId} AND unread.is_read = false ) AS unread_count FROM latest l LEFT JOIN sys_user target ON l.target_id = target.id LEFT JOIN sys_user sender ON l.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN sys_user receiver ON l.receiver_id = receiver.id LEFT JOIN product p ON l.product_id = p.id ORDER BY l.create_time DESC, l.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM private_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = false
